latin: Norsemanni castra in terra nova posuerunt. Thorvald, frater Leifi, indigenas exploravit. sed pax non diu mansit — sagittis vulneratus est et in terra aliena mortuus est. 'terra pulchra,' dixit moriens, 'hic manere vellem.'

questions.target: He was wounded by arrows and died
choices: He was wounded by arrows and died

questions.target: He wished he could stay in the beautiful land
choices: He wished he could stay in the beautiful land

translation: The Norsemen made camp in the new land. Thorvald, Leif's brother, explored the native people. But peace did not last long — he was wounded by arrows and died in the foreign land. 'Beautiful land,' he said while dying, 'I would like to stay here.'
